prompt: Rewrite the unnatural expression naturally: “the productivity will be better”
explanation: 「生産性が良くなる」は productivity will improve が自然。

prompt: Rewrite the unnatural expression naturally: “companies can get more benefits”
explanation: 効果を具体化して companies can improve productivity と言う。

prompt: Rewrite the unnatural expression naturally: “by online training, benefit both employees and companies”
answer: online training can benefit both employees and companies
explanation: benefitを動詞で使うなら主語が必要。

prompt: Rewrite the unnatural expression naturally: “reduce the costs to pay for employees”
explanation: 交通費なら reduce travel expenses が自然。

prompt: Rewrite the unnatural expression naturally: “take short time breaks”
explanation: 「短い休憩を取る」は take short breaks。

prompt: Rewrite the unnatural expression naturally: “work for four days a week”
explanation: 「週4日働く」は work four days a week。

prompt: Rewrite the unnatural expression naturally: “make employees reduce their stress”
explanation: makeを使わず reduce employees’ stress。

prompt: Rewrite the unnatural expression naturally: “more opportunity to learn”
explanation: more の後は opportunities が自然。

prompt: Rewrite the unnatural expression naturally: “provide benefit”
explanation: 名詞で使うなら provide benefits。動詞なら benefit people。

prompt: Rewrite the unnatural expression naturally: “from the perspective of them”
explanation: Speakingでは for them の方が自然。

prompt: Rewrite the unnatural expression naturally: “less homeworks”
explanation: homework は不可算名詞。

explanation: 「服にかかるお金を節約」は save money on clothes。

prompt: Rewrite the unnatural expression naturally: “score homework”
explanation: 宿題を採点するは grade homework。

prompt: Rewrite the unnatural expression naturally: “at early age”

prompt: Rewrite the unnatural expression naturally: “opportunity of acquire vocabulary”
explanation: opportunity of V ではなく opportunities to V。

prompt: Rewrite the unnatural expression naturally: “control employees’ health”
explanation: control は強すぎるので support が自然。

prompt: Rewrite the unnatural expression naturally: “healthy food to employees”

prompt: Rewrite the unnatural expression naturally: “more productivity of a certain time”

prompt: Rewrite the unnatural expression naturally: “more easier”

prompt: Rewrite the unnatural expression naturally: “benefit the procedure of meetings”
explanation: 会議を効率化するは make meetings more efficient。

prompt: Rewrite the unnatural expression naturally: “the final productivity would be better”

prompt: Rewrite the unnatural expression naturally: “without caring for a working load”
explanation: 負担を増やさずには without increasing employees’ workload。

prompt: Rewrite the unnatural expression naturally: “these relaxing time”
explanation: time to relax が自然で使いやすい。

prompt: Rewrite the unnatural expression naturally: “make new employees increase their confidence”

prompt: Rewrite the unnatural expression naturally: “reduce the failure by new employees”

prompt: Rewrite the unnatural expression naturally: “save money to buy uniforms”
explanation: 制服代を節約は save money on uniforms。

prompt: Rewrite the unnatural expression naturally: “business persons”

prompt: Rewrite the unnatural expression naturally: “make their flexibility better”

hint: make it easier for 人 to V
explanation: 抽象的なflexibilityより、通勤しやすいと具体化する。

prompt: Rewrite the unnatural expression naturally: “This can lead to literacy”
explanation: literacy は improve digital literacy と言う。

prompt: Rewrite the unnatural expression naturally: “less opportunity”

prompt: Rewrite the unnatural expression naturally: “limitation of time”

prompt: Rewrite the unnatural expression naturally: “social study”

prompt: Rewrite the unnatural expression naturally: “current meeting room are a place”

prompt: Rewrite the unnatural expression naturally: “mental support”
explanation: 今回のテーマでは mental health support。

prompt: Rewrite the unnatural expression naturally: “the person’s productivity”
explanation: 一般論では employees’ productivity。

prompt: Rewrite the unnatural expression naturally: “by this knowledge”

prompt: Rewrite the unnatural expression naturally: “employees can get more benefit”
explanation: benefitを具体的な効果にする。

prompt: Rewrite the unnatural expression naturally: “because, efficient”
explanation: 形容詞だけで終わらず文を完成させる。

prompt: Rewrite the unnatural expression naturally: “it is good to allow employees to take short breaks”
answer: short breaks can benefit both employees and companies
